specific_question: In 2025, what percentage of support interactions require Rachel or another supervisor to personally intervene?
answer: In 2025, only 6% of customer support interactions require escalation to Rachel or another supervisor for resolution, indicating strong front-line capability.
dr_question: A 2022 patient experience report found that six in 10 patients identified poor online booking tools and convoluted call centers as barriers to making appointments. When individual patients or corporate employees struggle to book appointments on MediConn Solutions' platform, how can I determine whether the root cause is poot booking tool design or convoluted customer support processes?
